report.summary: Community growth cycle v15 (evening): Drafted 6 new social posts (market outlook, tokenized gold promo, AMM guide promo, SUI institutional 4-part thread, ETH IEF hook, engagement poll), full weekly newsletter for Thu Mar 27, Discord/TG announcement for 2 new guides, and created 2 branded SVG social cards (Tokenized Gold Guide + Weekly Market Rebound). All content tied to live market data: BTC $70.6K rebound, ETH $2,141 with 121% address surge, SUI 2x ETF approval, tokenized gold at $6B+.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #31: Monday Market Outlook — BTC $67.3K→$70.6K rebound on Iran postponement, ETH 121% address surge, fear-greed tool link (Schedule Mon PM)
Tweet #32: Tokenized Gold Guide promo — $6B market, XAUT $3B vs PAXG $2.6B, DeFi use cases (Schedule Mon/Tue)
Tweet #33: AMM & Liquidity Pools Guide promo — x*y=k, Uniswap V4 hooks, top 5 platforms (Schedule Tue)
Tweet #34: SUI Institutional thread (4 parts) — 2x ETF on Nasdaq, Grayscale trust, Confidential DApps, whale tracker link (Schedule Wed)
Tweet #35: Ethereum IEF NYC hook — $250T AUM execs, CLARITY Act 70% passage odds, $103M liquidation flush (Schedule Wed/Thu)
Tweet #36: Engagement poll — 'Where are you putting your next $1,000?' across gold/BTC/ETH/alts (Schedule Fri)
Newsletter v8: Full weekly digest for Thu Mar 27 — market pulse (BTC $70.6K, ETH $2,141, SUI ETF), 2 new guides, SEC commodities recap, degen corner on PAXG premium signal
Discord/TG announcement: Two new learn guides (Tokenized Gold + AMM/LP) with market pulse context
Content calendar v12 — 8 posts scheduled Mar 23–30 across Twitter/Discord/Email

sections.title: Social Visuals Created
items: SVG card: 'Tokenized Gold Guide 2026' — 1200x630, dark glass-morphism, 3 amber stat boxes (XAUT $3B, PAXG $2.6B, Gold $4,700/oz), feature pills (DeFi Use Cases, Risk Analysis, Head-to-Head, How to Buy), decorative Au coin element

SVG card: 'Geopolitical Whipsaw — Markets Rebound' — 1200x630, dark theme with stylized BTC price chart (red→green), 4 stat cards (BTC $70.6K +2.6%, ETH $2,141 -2.75%, SUI 2x ETF Approved, Tokenized Gold $6B+), brand gradient accents

sections.title: Market Intelligence Used
items: BTC: $70,599 — rebounded from $67,363 dip after Trump postponed Iran strikes (+2.6% recovery, +5.2% intraday swing)
ETH: $2,141 — down 2.75% 24h, $103M liquidation cascade, but 121% active address surge Mar 15-19; IEF NYC event today with $250T AUM represented
SUI: First 2x ETF (TXXS) approved on Nasdaq via 21Shares; Grayscale filed S-1 for Sui Trust; Crypto.com added regulated custody; price target $3 mid-2026
Tokenized Gold: $6B+ market cap, XAUT $3B (Swiss LBMA), PAXG $2.6B (NYDFS); PAXG trading at premium to spot — institutional demand signal
Regulatory: SEC 16 digital commodities (Mar 17) continues driving coverage; CLARITY Act 70% passage probability; Nasdaq approved for tokenized equities
Week ahead: Fed's Miran speaks, BitGo earnings, Casper hard fork
